query:
-- Update David Carrillo's zone to include more of LA's sub-cities
UPDATE agent_zones SET cities = '["Torrance","Pasadena","Pomona","El Monte","Downey","Inglewood","West Covina","Norwalk","Burbank","Glendale","Compton","Carson","Hawthorne","El Segundo","Gardena"]' WHERE agentName = 'David Carrillo';

-- Update Miguel Flores to focus on core LA + Orange County
UPDATE agent_zones SET cities = '["Los Angeles","Long Beach","Anaheim","Santa Ana","Irvine","Huntington Beach","Garden Grove","Oceanside","Costa Mesa","Fullerton"]' WHERE agentName = 'Miguel Flores';

-- Reassign leads: David gets anything with Torrance, Pasadena, Burbank, Glendale, Inglewood, Downey, Compton, Pomona, El Monte, West Covina in address
UPDATE saved_leads SET assignedAgent = 'David Carrillo' 
WHERE (address LIKE '%Torrance%' OR address LIKE '%Pasadena%' OR address LIKE '%Burbank%' 
    OR address LIKE '%Glendale%' OR address LIKE '%Inglewood%' OR address LIKE '%Downey%'
    OR address LIKE '%Pomona%' OR address LIKE '%El Monte%' OR address LIKE '%West Covina%'
    OR address LIKE '%Norwalk%' OR address LIKE '%Compton%' OR address LIKE '%Carson%'
    OR address LIKE '%Hawthorne%' OR address LIKE '%Gardena%');

-- Reassign leads: David gets anything with Torrance, Pasadena, Burbank, Glendale, Inglewood, Downey, Compton, Pomona, El Monte, West Covina in address
